problem id: be32b22a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00001001 -> 01000000
  10001001 -> 01001000
  01101001 -> 01000110
  01100010 -> 10000110
  01001001 -> 01000100
  01000010 -> 10000100
  10111010 -> 10001011
  00011101 -> 01000001
  00100101 -> 01000010

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 11000011
